summary: P5: write endpoint — POST /api/tags/:id/action with zod, idempotency on client_action_id, never touches staged_tags or edges

resolution.note: POST /api/tags/:id/action lands. Idempotent on client_action_id, 404 on bogus id, 400 on schema violation. Smoke-tested live: write+replay+bogus+reassign-with/without reassign_to all behave per spec; staged_tags/edges unchanged; review_actions rows cleaned up post-test.
